text.value: Laboratory Report
Laboratory studies

Mucus [Presence] in Urine sediment by Light microscopy
Bacteria [#/area] in Urine sediment by Microscopy high power field
Bacteria identified in Urine by Culture

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The findings indicate a urinary tract infection (UTI) with significant pyuria, bacteriuria, and positive nitrites, with Staphylococcus aureus identified in high quantity. Hematuria and mild proteinuria are present. Glucosuria is noted, which may warrant further evaluation for diabetes. The low specific gravity could suggest dilute urine. Clinical correlation and prompt treatment are recommended.

text.value: Rosario Varela

text.div: Provider Organization: Centro Privado de Educación Especial Parálisis Cerebral Infantil
